Name: insert_user_departments
SQL: WITH check_nested_department_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "name", $3::text AS "description", $4::numeric AS "budget") AS data WHERE true), nested_department_0 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."departments" ("id", "name", "description", "budget") SELECT check_nested_department_0."id", check_nested_department_0."name", check_nested_department_0."description", check_nested_department_0."budget" FROM check_nested_department_0 RETURNING *), check_nested_employees_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $5::uuid AS "user_id", $6::text AS "role") AS data WHERE true), nested_employees_0 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "role", "department_id") SELECT check_nested_employees_0."user_id", check_nested_employees_0."role", nested_department_0."id" FROM check_nested_employees_0, nested_department_0 RETURNING *), check_nested_department_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $7::uuid AS "id", $8::text AS "name", $9::text AS "description", $10::numeric AS "budget") AS data WHERE true), nested_department_1 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."departments" ("id", "name", "description", "budget") SELECT check_nested_department_1."id", check_nested_department_1."name", check_nested_department_1."description", check_nested_department_1."budget" FROM check_nested_department_1 RETURNING *), check_nested_employees_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $11::uuid AS "user_id", $12::text AS "role") AS data WHERE true), nested_employees_1 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "role", "department_id") SELECT check_nested_employees_1."user_id", check_nested_employees_1."role", nested_department_1."id" FROM check_nested_employees_1, nested_department_1 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result_0 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $13::uuid AS "user_id", $14::text AS "role") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_0 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "role", "department_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_0."user_id", check_mutation_result_0."role", nested_department_0."id" FROM check_mutation_result_0, nested_department_0 RETURNING *), check_mutation_result_1 AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $15::uuid AS "user_id", $16::text AS "role") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result_1 AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "role", "department_id") SELECT check_mutation_result_1."user_id", check_mutation_result_1."role", nested_department_1."id" FROM check_mutation_result_1, nested_department_1 RETURNING *), mutation_result AS (SELECT mutation_result_0."user_id", mutation_result_0."department_id", mutation_result_0."role", mutation_result_0."joined_at", mutation_result_0."is_active" FROM mutation_result_0 UNION ALL SELECT mutation_result_1."user_id", mutation_result_1."department_id", mutation_result_1."role", mutation_result_1."joined_at", mutation_result_1."is_active" FROM mutation_result_1) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_department_0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_department_1) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_employees_0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_employees_1)), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."user_id" AS "user_id", mutation_result."department_id" AS "department_id", mutation_result."role" AS "role" FROM mutation_result WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_department_0) IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_department_1) IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_employees_0) IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_employees_1) IS NOT NULL) AS "_e"))
